departments.label: Narrative
departments.instructions: Protect lore quality, plan beats, and keep content aligned with the game’s identity.

departments.label: Systems
departments.instructions: Tune mechanics, rewards, and friction; watch for exploits, churn, and power creep.

departments.label: Live Ops
departments.instructions: Schedule weekly drops, respond to telemetry, and keep the cadence engaging.

departments.label: Player Trust
departments.instructions: Reduce toxicity, handle feedback, and coordinate interventions that rebuild confidence.

theme: A live-service MMO studio balancing content cadence, community health, and competitive pressure.
